positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a celestial fox silhouette leaping through a nebula made of abstract bioluminescent watercolor washes. The fox is poised mid-air against a deep midnight blue and cosmic purple background. The scene features swirling clouds of brilliant emerald green and gold particulate matter, giving a sense of magical movement. The overall aesthetic is modern, ethereal, and high-contrast, perfect for screen printing on fabric. Geometric celestial elements, constellations, and stylized floral vines subtly wrap around the central fox motif. Flat design principles mixed with watercolor texture. Highly detailed, central composition, clean lines, strong contrast.
